title: [v4.4] fix: don't output "ago" when container is currently up and running
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #17251

/assign rhatdan

```release-note
Fix `podman ps` STATUS output to say "Up 3 seconds", if the container has been up and running for 3 seconds (removing the word "ago".
```
